message:
feat(config): add config file watcher and theme configuration

This commit adds runtime configuration reloading and theme selection support
to enable dynamic reconfiguration without restarting NTM.

Config File Watcher (watch.go):
- Watch() function monitors config file for changes using watcher package
- Uses 500ms debounce to avoid multiple reloads on single save
- Falls back to watching directory if config file doesn't exist yet
- Returns closer function for graceful shutdown
- Calls onChange callback with new *Config when changes detected
- Logs errors during reload but continues watching

Config Theme Field (config.go):
- Add Theme field to Config struct (toml:"theme")
- Supported values: mocha, macchiato, nord, latte, auto
- Update Print() to output theme configuration with comment
- Defaults to "auto" when not specified

Theme FromName Function (theme.go):
- Add FromName(name string) Theme function
- Extracts theme selection logic from Current()
- Refactor Current() to use FromName(os.Getenv("NTM_THEME"))
- Enables programmatic theme selection without env vars
- Supported themes: macchiato, nord, latte, mocha (default)
- Auto mode detects terminal background color

Architecture:
The watcher integration enables the dashboard to:
1. Subscribe to config changes via channel
2. Receive ConfigReloadMsg when config file is modified
3. Apply new settings (theme, palette, etc.) without restart

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@ func (c *Config) GenerateAgentCommand(tmplStr string, vars AgentTemplateVars) (s
 // Config represents the main configuration
 type Config struct {
 	ProjectsBase  string            `toml:"projects_base"`
+	Theme         string            `toml:"theme"`        // UI Theme (mocha, macchiato, nord, latte, auto)
 	PaletteFile   string            `toml:"palette_file"` // Path to command_palette.md (optional)
 	Agents        AgentConfig       `toml:"agents"`
 	Palette       []PaletteCmd      `toml:"palette"`
@@ -1019,6 +1020,14 @@ func Print(cfg *Config, w io.Writer) error {
 	fmt.Fprintf(w, "projects_base = %q\n", cfg.ProjectsBase)
 	fmt.Fprintln(w)
 
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# UI Theme (mocha, macchiato, nord, latte, auto)")
+	if cfg.Theme != "" {
+		fmt.Fprintf(w, "theme = %q\n", cfg.Theme)
+	} else {
+		fmt.Fprintln(w, "# theme = \"auto\"")
+	}
+	fmt.Fprintln(w)
+
 	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# Path to command palette markdown file (optional)")
 	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# If set, loads palette commands from this file instead of [[palette]] entries below")
 	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# Searched automatically: ~/.config/ntm/command_palette.md, ./command_palette.md")
